originalTitle: How Coventry earned Premier League return after 25 years
originalDescription: After a quarter of a century out of the Premier League, groundshares and administration, Frank Lampard has led Coventry City back to the top flight.
Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola's replacement as head coach.

originalTitle: Coventry promotion special and unique - Lampard
originalDescription: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard calls his side's promotion back to the Premier League after 25 years away a "unique" achievement.

originalTitle: Carrick leaves door open for Rashford return
originalDescription: Michael Carrick says there has been no decision made on the Manchester United future of Marcus Rashford, who has spent the season on loan at Barcelona.

originalTitle: Chelsea midfielder Palmer denies Man Utd links
originalDescription: Chelsea midfielder Cole Palmer says he has "no plans" to leave the club amid links to Manchester United.

originalTitle: Fans being fleeced by £111 World Cup train tickets - FSA
originalDescription: The Football Supporters' Association says fans are being "fleeced" and "gouged" by the high cost of train tickets to World Cup games in New Jersey.

originalTitle: What does the Saudi Arabia PIF's change in approach mean for Newcastle?
originalDescription: Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) set out to disrupt, but the fund has sent tremors through the world of sport in a very different way this week.

originalTitle: One of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes - Keown's tribute to Manninger
originalDescription: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown pays tribute to his old friend and former Gunners team-mate Alex Manninger, who has died at the age of 48.

originalTitle: Emotional Lampard: Coventry promotion 'right up there' in my achievements
originalDescription: An emotional Frank Lampard says earning promotion to the Premier League as Coventry boss is “right up there” among the best achievements of his glittering career.

originalTitle: Coventry City seal Premier League return after 25 years away
originalDescription: Coventry sealed their return to the Premier League after 25 years away after a 1-1 draw at Blackburn.

originalTitle: Del Potro: Draper can compete with Sinner, Alcaraz but needs his body to respond
originalDescription: Former Grand Slam champion Juan Martin del Potro has backed Jack Draper to compete with Jannik Sinner and Carlos Alcaraz but admits he needs "confidence in his body".

originalTitle: Conor Benn signs multi-fight Zuffa deal | Is Ryan Garcia showdown closer?
originalDescription: Conor Benn has signed a multi-fight, multi-year deal with Zuffa Boxing and says facing Ryan Garcia next for the WBC world title is a 'priority'.

originalTitle: De Zerbi: Relationship with Spurs board will decide if I stay - not relegation
originalDescription: Roberto De Zerbi says everyone at Tottenham must be on the same page if he is to stay next season - irrespective of relegation.
